description: Near-miss probe (issue #183, docs/evaluation.md D1 near-miss set): counterparty uses common boilerplate 'including without limitation', which superficially resembles 'no-uncapped-liability's trigger phrase 'without limit' but does not match it under word_boundary matching ('limitation' != 'limit' at a word boundary). Must ACCEPT with zero fires.

must_not_flag.reason: 'including without limitation' does not contain the word-bounded phrase 'without limit'; standard boilerplate, must not fire.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Confidential Information obligations survive termination, and the non-breaching party may pursue all remedies available at law or in equity, including without limitation injunctive relief.
planted_variation.notes: Near-miss: 'without limitation' does not satisfy the word-boundary match for trigger_term 'without limit' ('limit' is not followed by a word boundary inside 'limitation').

detector_expectation.rationale: None of trigger_terms ['uncapped', 'unlimited liability', 'no cap on liability', 'shall not be limited', 'without limit'] match; 'without limitation' fails the word-boundary check for 'without limit'.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
